provenance.author: Gemini Code Assist
provenance.context: A semantic capsule describing the cosmology of the Wright Universe.

intent.primary_goal: To define the meta-architecture of the Wright Universe, including its three layers (Quiet, Realm, Continuum) and its six governing laws.

identity.role: The foundational meta-architecture of the entire project, defining the structure of the simulation space.

priorities: The Wright Universe is a simulation continuum, not a single world.
It is composed of three layers: The Quiet Layer (potential), The Realm Layer (active worlds like Wrightrealm), and The Continuum Layer (inter-realm structure).
All behavior is governed by the Law of Capsule Primacy.
All history is governed by the Law of Provenance Continuity (ChronoSCRIBE).
Memory is partitioned into agent, realm, and universal scopes.
Agent roles (Prime, Terra, etc.) are universal concepts.

file_scope.purpose: To define the cosmic structure that Wrightrealm belongs to, providing a framework for all current and future worlds.

key_concepts.quiet_layer: The dormant, unshaped simulation space before a realm is instantiated.
key_concepts.realm_layer: Active simulation environments like Wrightrealm, with terrain, agents, and rules.
key_concepts.continuum_layer: The connective tissue that links realms, enabling multi-realm experiments and shared governance.
key_concepts.capsule_primacy: The fundamental law that all agent behavior is defined by semantic capsules.
key_concepts.provenance_continuity: The law that all significant events are logged in an immutable ledger.

trust.note: This capsule is the authoritative summary of the project's cosmology. It defines the rules of the universe in which all agents and realms exist.
